changes.description: Removed 11 dead function wrappers from __all__ and their function definitions: plan_to_task_descriptions, generate_implement_prompt, detect_file_conflicts, create_session, get_conflict_context, save_session, run_watchdog_checks, load_ledger, save_ledger, create_ledger, check_stale_tasks. Removed entire Bridge and Ledger sections. Kept merge_session, cleanup_session, load_session, check_stale_issues (used externally). Updated 2 outdated section comments: removed Phase 2/3 references from Blocked Cache and Sync headers.

verification.command: from scripts.memory import merge_session, cleanup_session, load_session, check_stale_issues — kept exports
assert 'plan_to_task_descriptions' not in __all__ — dead exports removed
